claims.summary: The entropy gate should have a C1-smooth onset without a pop.
claims.disposition: Verified exact smoothstep formula and requested boundary regressions.

claims.summary: Entropy values around 0.845 and 0.855 should produce a tiny continuous delta.
claims.disposition: Verified current 0.84/0.86 and exact-threshold smoothness tests.

claims.summary: Tail compression and overflow should remain visible when high-entropy lift is active.
claims.disposition: Verified codec overflow, fidelity, and tail-headroom receipts.

claims.summary: Tail lift should not write narrative or reserved dimensions.
claims.disposition: Verified exact vector regressions preserve those lanes.

claims.summary: The default clamp should increase to 7.5 or become density-dependent.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a Tier 5 codec gain and output-contract change.
